question: Find the number of programs for each channel. Return the name of each channel as well.
sql: SELECT channel.Name, COUNT(program.Program_ID) FROM channel JOIN program ON channel.Channel_ID = program.Channel_ID GROUP BY channel.Channel_ID, channel.Name;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个频道的节目数量

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求统计每个频道的节目数量并返回频道名称，SQL描述中的意图、表结构、聚合函数（COUNT(program.Program_ID)）和分组字段（channel.Channel_ID, channel.Name）均准确对应。虽然columns仅列出channel.Name，但实际查询中通过group_by确保每个频道名称对应唯一计数结果，符合原始问题需求。
